reasoning: The Manifold community placed the probability at 46% on May 1, 2025. Early May data shows that TSLA was trading between $285 and $287. Since the market price was 46%, it is clear that TSLA has not dropped below $200 between January 1, 2025 and May 1, 2025. Tesla is a highly volatile stock, and a drop from $285 to $199 (about a 30% drop) within the remaining 8 months of the year is entirely plausible—aligning effectively with the ~46% option-implied probability. Because only about 10 days have elapsed since the May 1 baseline and there has been no dramatic movement to the upside or downside beyond recent levels, the underlying probability remains largely unchanged. I estimate it slightly lower than the May 1 baseline to account for time decay.
